problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: The key to What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? is Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry — specifically Metal-organic framework with — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
